APPEARANCES: LUCIENNE HUNTER, PRO PER (510.531.3001) APPEARING ON HER OWN BEHALF. B. THOMAS FRENCH, ESQUIRE (HASSARD BONNINGTON, 415.288.9800) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE. COURT CONTINUES THE HEARING ON THE MOTION TO DISMISS THE REGENTS TO FEBRUARY 20, 2008 AT 9:30 A. M.
